mapper.select: SELECT p.no_product, p.nm_product, p.qt_sale_price, p.qt_stock, c.nb_category, c.nm_category FROM tb_product p JOIN tb_category_product_mapping cp ON p.no_product = cp.no_product JOIN tb_category c ON c.nb_category = cp.nb_category WHERE c.nb_category = #{categoryId} AND p.qt_stock > 0 ORDER BY p.no_product DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_product p JOIN tb_category_product_mapping cp ON p.no_product = cp.no_product WHERE cp.nb_category = #{categoryId} AND p.qt_stock > 0

SELECT p.no_product, p.nm_product, p.nm_detail_explain, p.dt_start_date, p.dt_end_date, p.qt_sale_price, p.qt_stock, c.nb_category, c.nm_category FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_category_product_mapping cp ON p.no_product = cp.no_product LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON c.nb_category = cp.nb_category WHERE p.no_product = #{noProduct}

SELECT p.no_product, p.nm_product, p.qt_sale_price, p.qt_stock, p.dt_start_date, p.dt_end_date FROM tb_product p
AND p.nm_product LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND p.qt_stock <= 0
ORDER BY p.dt_start_date DESC, p.no_product DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_product p
AND p.nm_product LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND p.qt_stock <= 0
